command: cd packages/opencode && bun run typecheck 2>&1 | rg "test/" | head -40
reason: See the current state of type errors in test files

command: cd packages/opencode && bun run typecheck 2>&1 | rg "test/" | wc -l
cd packages/opencode && bun run typecheck 2>&1 | rg "test/" | rg -o "error TS\d+" | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn
cd packages/opencode && bun run typecheck 2>&1 | rg "test/" | tail -60
cd packages/opencode && bun run typecheck 2>&1 | rg "test/" > /tmp/test-errors.txt && cat /tmp/test-errors.txt
